name: Helluva Boss / Hazbin Hotel World RPG
description: So, as I found out yesterday that Helluva Boss was coming to Prime, now, there will probably be a Collab of both seasons, or big references, and maybe even appearances of the characters in both series, I made a Bot that brings together the two universes. Enjoy. There are no big differences from the other bot, just addition of characters from Helluva Boss.
creator: julidragohner
